description: Product modules are AI-facing game-factory building blocks. They are larger than low-level capabilities and compile into internal line-style DSL.

fieldNotes.llm1Card: Short product-level card safe for LLM1. Do not include full low-level DSL.
fieldNotes.compiler.dsl: Internal low-level DSL template lines consumed by ai/pipeline.js.
fieldNotes.compiler.slots: Internal module-link slots. Slots are patched by compiler.links and are not automatically LLM2-configurable.
fieldNotes.compiler.slotPatches: Internal patch templates used when a newly installed module links into an already installed base module.
fieldNotes.compiler.links: Module-level integration hooks that fill named slots in other modules.
fieldNotes.compiler.configurePatches: Per-parameter patches for configuring an already installed module from ProjectWorld state.
fieldNotes.interaction: AI-visible fixed runtime interaction contract. Use this for trigger/copy constraints without exposing internal DSL templates.
fieldNotes.sync: Supported future networking policy for this module.
fieldNotes.repositoryPolicy: Module repository strategy. Product modules are reused from the module repository; expensive generated module variants must be promoted back as cloud-module candidates instead of remaining one-off outputs.
